AFWD.justification: Forward progression of repeat domain folding

AREV.justification: Reverse structural fluctuations requiring adaptive binding

CLINK.justification: Chained residue selection for epitope matching

FSPLIT.justification: Simultaneous binding affinity and thermal stability design

FFUSE.justification: Reconstituted protein merging both design arms

ENGAGR.justification: Simultaneous bound/unbound states during conformational changes

phase_3.void_description: Unexpressed genetic blueprint in plasmid vector
phase_3.true_description: Active DARPin neutralizing allergens in nasal lumen
phase_3.false_description: Ineffective protein degraded by mucosal enzymes
phase_3.both_description: Transition state during epitope-paratope conformational matching

steps.domain_action: Record final formulation in delivery matrix

phase_6.post_cycle_state: Structured DARPin with negative entropy compensation
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — Folded structure entropy loss balanced by solvent reorganization
